parent.snippet: Peer learning, networking, and startup collaborations Upskilling sessions led by AI trainers and practitioners Whether you're a developer, researcher, startup founder, student, or AI enthusiast, you'll find a collaborative space to connect, learn, and co-create with others passionate about shaping the AI future from Hyderabad.
